facets.name: absorbs
data: src/systems/smoke_zone_tick.js (emit side; particle render is new substrate primitive)

data.comment: Ephemeral white-grey puff spawned by particle-emitter facets (smoke hazard-zone today; future: dust, steam, sparks via per-variant tuning). Despawns via ttl. The smoke-particle kind is what makes hazard-zone-smoke render — smoke zones are invisible emitters, only their particles are seen.
